reviews.review_description: It was not really fun there wasn’t anything to do no mods worked nothing that really was good

developer_response.body: If you're only playing for mods then we do not want you playing. The whole point of this game is to have a good time with friends.

reviews.review_description: Can i get all cosmetics in this game? this game is very good! and i want talk to you cause i want to get all cosmetics in this game🤓
I’m admin and I like it sigma gyat

This game is very good. 

There is an issue with the shiny rocks currently so you cannot purchase cosmetics. 

hope this issue is fixed soon!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! I believe in 0.0.7 the issue was fixed. Have a great time!

reviews.review_description: It is great I love the mod menu too! If your looking for a good fan game based on gorilla tag this one will do the job

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for the 5 stars, I really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description:
THIS GAME IS THE BEST I EAS SO LUCKY TO GET FINGER PAINTER THE STAFF IS SO NICE AND CHILL IM APPLYING FOR MODERATOR TO KEEP THE COMMUNITY GOOD THERE IS A AMAZING MOD MENU AMAZING STAFF AND AOURA IS SO NICE SO IS WARRICK,OZZY,KYLER,PIANOMAN,DRAGON,ETC

HOPE HOWEVER READS THIS FINDS THIS HELPFUL GET THE GAME IT IS THE BEST GORILLA TAG COPY EVER. 

From:Blumpy Vr

developer_response.body: Thanks blumpy! This review is greatly appreciated and I hope it can be helpful to others.

reviews.review_description: It was scary but I also got the game it was fun but I was scared

If I could make my review zero stars, I would. Absolutely terrible game. Can’t even jump (or even move) because it’s just so laggy. The owner kept on kicking me, even though I did nothing wrong. it’s just a copy and paste of gorilla tag with a few things. I thought it was a fan game, you know, something ORIGINAL.

developer_response.body: First of all, the first bug was fixed many updates ago. I can also see what update you are playing on, so I know for a fact it isn't like that. 2nd of all, you must've gotten kicked for a reason. 3rd of all, the name starts with project, clearly stating it's a gorilla tag copy.
